name: Money Sense
description: Interactive financial literacy game teaching kids money counting, budgeting, savings goals, and smart spending decisions

tools.name: start_money_lesson
tools.description: Start a new money sense lesson with the specified activity and difficulty.

tools.name: get_money_progress
tools.description: Get the student's financial literacy progress and achievements.

tools.name: get_money_tip
tools.description: Get a helpful money tip or hint for the current activity.
